privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated dataset of 1500 ED visit records. The expected target LOS is 240 minutes, and the ESI levels range from 1 to 5. The LWBS (Left Without Being Seen) rate is approximately 4.1%. Analysis of the generated data contradicts the claimed average Door-to-Doctor time of 45 minutes; the actual mean delay across the generated dataset is approximately 58.5 minutes.
